creator: rgrimes@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is a meta bug for tracking the action item list created during the BSDCan 2018 Developers summit in Ottawa, CA on June 7, 2018.

Each action item from this list:
    https://wiki.freebsd.org/DevSummit/201806HaveNeedWant12
shall have a blocks: set to this bug.

This bug is assigned to rgrimes@ for now, RE@ shall be added after I have all the PR's created so releasing engineering can see the progress, but not be spammed while I add them.
